nodes.name: 白腹长嘴山鹑
nodes.summary: 白腹长嘴山鹑（Dulit partridge，学名 Rhizothera dulitensis），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Orenstein et al. (2010) suggest that the partridge may be seriously threatened by habitat degradation and hunting, and that an important conservation priority is its rediscovery. BirdLife International considers that it may have been in rapid decline because of habitat destruction and degradation, and that its taxonomic status should be investigated
